official_measure_name_from_technical_gui: Case-mix adjusted weekend total nurse HPRD
official_description: Case-mix adjusted total nursing hours per resident day for RN, LPN/LVN, and aide hours averaged across weekend days.
official_rating_role: 50-point weekend staffing component; higher values receive more points.
point_rule: National deciles; lowest decile 5 points, highest decile 50 points.

notes: Safe enough to rerun the RD running variable as reconstructed official-like evidence, not a directly observed July score.

official_description: Percentage of nursing staff that left the nursing home over a twelve-month period.
official_rating_role: 50-point turnover component; lower turnover receives more points.
point_rule: National deciles; highest turnover decile 5 points, lowest turnover decile 50 points.
official_raw_or_adjusted_status: directly published official turnover measure derived from employee-level PBJ
reconstruction_formula_if_any: CMS annual turnover method using six consecutive quarters of PBJ employee-level data
source_evidence: Five-Star Technical Users' Guide July 2022 staffing-domain section and Table 3/Table A2; Provider Data Catalog ProviderInfo field audit; V3 emulator validation table
notes: Requires employee-level identifiers to calculate from raw data; direct facility-level measure is in ProviderInfo after January 2022.

official_description: Number of administrators who left the nursing home over a twelve-month period.
official_rating_role: 30-point administrator turnover component; fewer departures receive more points.
point_rule: 0 departures = 30 points; 1 departure = 25 points; 2 or more departures = 10 points.
official_raw_or_adjusted_status: directly published official turnover/departure measure derived from employee-level PBJ
exact_available_field_jan2022: Number of administrators who have left the nursing home
exact_available_field_apr2022: Number of administrators who have left the nursing home
exact_available_field_jul2022: Number of administrators who have left the nursing home
exact_available_field_oct2022: Number of administrators who have left the nursing home
exact_available_field_jan2023: Number of administrators who have left the nursing home
reconstruction_formula_if_any: CMS administrator turnover/departure method using employee-level PBJ job code 1
source_evidence: Five-Star Technical Users' Guide July 2022 staffing-domain section and Table 3/Table A2; Provider Data Catalog ProviderInfo field audit; V3 emulator validation table
notes: Direct facility-level measure is in ProviderInfo after January 2022; raw reconstruction requires employee-level job code and employee identifier.
